claimText: NexCAR19 is India's first indigenous Chimeric Antigen Receptor T-cell (CAR-T) therapy.
evidenceExcerpt: NexCAR19 is India's first indigenous CAR T-cell therapy.
examUse: Statement-based question on indigenous biotechnology developments.

claimText: NexCAR19 is developed specifically for the treatment of B-cell blood cancers.
evidenceExcerpt: It is developed specifically for B-cell blood cancers.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching the therapy to its target disease.

claimText: NexCAR19 was developed by ImmunoACT, incubated under IIT Bombay and Tata Memorial Hospital, with support from DBT and BIRAC.
evidenceExcerpt: Developed by ImmunoACT (incubated under IIT Bombay and Tata Memorial Hospital) with support from DBT and BIRAC.
examUse: Institution-feature question identifying the developers and supporting agencies of NexCAR19.
distractorHooks: Supported by CSIR instead of DBT/BIRAC
